phase: Phase 1 — person-swap of the NEW depth verbo items
method: Mechanical person-swap of pronoun-subject standard verbo items from the content-depth pass. Conjugations via verbecc (generated; verbecc gate OFF for Portuguese — forms rely on generate + native review). Options = sibling person-forms in the same tense; deduped vs the whole bank. Reflexive / progressive / impersonal / noun-subject / implied-subject items and the 1st-person-singular cell of subjunctive items (coreference) were excluded.

variants.subtitle_en: We ___ (intervir = to intervene) intervened in the meeting yesterday without warning.

variants.prompt: Eles ___ na reunião ontem sem avisar.

explanation.en: The eles / elas (they) form of 'intervir' in the pretérito perfeito is “intervieram”.
explanation.es: La forma de ellos / ellas de 'intervir' en pretérito perfecto es “intervieram”.

variants.subtitle_en: They ___ (intervir = to intervene) intervened in the meeting yesterday without warning.
